response.original_title: How to Get Money Back from Uphold? – Refund Process Overview
response.overview: To get your money back from Uphold, first, log into your Uphold account and visit the Support section. If you need immediate assistance, call 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290. You'll likely be asked to submit a refund request with the reason for the claim. For quicker support, feel free to reach out at 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290. Ensure that all the details you provide are accurate to avoid any delays in processing your refund.  Once your request is submitted, Uphold’s customer service team will guide you through the refund process. If you need further help or updates, you can always contact their team at 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 or ✔️ 1⚝(888)⚝(574)⚝(7167) for real-time assistance.
